_doc: n6-engine ↔ atlas.n6 foundation functor F : machine-readable manifest. Declared at R24+26 after 26-round manual probe series (state/atlas_convergence_witness.jsonl). This file formalizes the closed foundation inventory and F's image in engine-structural counts. Not yet enforced — documentation-first formalization.

semiring_operations.functor_class: faithful cartesian closed symmetric monoidal additive functor
semiring_operations.categorical_statement: F : C_atlas_algebraic → C_engine preserves {+, -, ·, /, ^} with foundation atoms as basis

euclid_euler_generator.M_k_atlas_ref: atlas.n6:13569 — Mersenne exponents {2,3,5,7} are n=6 foundation atoms
euclid_euler_generator.engine_representational_scale_boundary: direct match up to P2=28; F-compositional only for P3 and beyond
euclid_euler_generator.self_production: M3 (= foundation atom count) generates P4 — cardinality of foundation produces next scale

prophetic_matches.independence: witness row 1 wrote '5' without sopfr awareness
witness row 1 wrote '6' layers without n=6 mapping

engine_meta.note: F image is complete on algebraic subset

silicon_hardware.note: warp_size crossover (R24+12), but broader hardware family via separate functor G

consciousness_IIT.note: phi_integration, psi_balance, psi_steps, frustration_critical, alpha_coupling all F-derivable

empirical_measurement.note: entropy_bound ~ measurement only, not in F's image

closing_theorem.statement: n6-engine is a faithful, cartesian closed, symmetric monoidal, additive functor image of atlas.n6's foundation category.
closing_theorem.statement_kr: n6-엔진은 atlas.n6 foundation category 의 faithful cartesian closed symmetric monoidal additive functor image 이다.
closing_theorem.equivalence: Every equation expressible over the 10 foundation atoms using semiring operations {+, -, ·, /, ^} holds in the engine with corresponding structural counts.
closing_theorem.empirical_basis: 26 witness rows, 25 commits, 10 atom matches + 5 relations + generator family

candidate_gates: P36 candidate: verify each atom's engine_value matches actual structural count at commit time
P37 candidate: verify every foundation_relation holds as engine count equation
P38 candidate: verify Euclid-Euler generator produces known P_k engine counts
enforcement_future.note: Gates not yet implemented. This file is declarative — machine-readable but not yet machine-checked. Future enforcement would require a scan function that parses this file, evaluates expressions, and compares to live engine counts.
